598.reason: [After the main loop ends, the final token may be a single '&' or '|', but isAnd()/isOr() check the current curchar, which may not correspond to the last token; this condition incorrectly uses curchar instead of checking if the last token was a single '&' or '|']

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [After the main loop ends, the final token may be a single '&' or '|', but isAnd()/isOr() check the current curchar, which may not correspond to the last token; this condition incorrectly uses curchar instead of checking if the last token was a single '&' or '|']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This condition checks the current curchar, not the last character of the unfinished token. After processing ends, curchar may not reflect the dangling '&' or '|'. The correct approach is to check if the last token is exactly "&" or "|".]
